Question: Solve the given system of equations by substitution. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{aaa}3 x - y & = & -2 \\ 2 x^{2} - y & = & 0\end{matrix}\right .$$
Solve the system of nonlinear equations. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{aaa}x^{2} + y^{2} & = & 10 \\ x - 3 y & = & -10\end{matrix}\right .$$
Find the solution set for the given system of nonlinear equations. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{aaa}4 x^{2} + y^{2} & = & 13 \\ x^{2} + y^{2} & = & 10\end{matrix}\right .$$
Graph the given system of inequalities. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{aaa}y & \geq & x^{2} - 1 \\ x - y & \geq & - 1\end{matrix}\right .$$
